purpose: Session summary / continuation context for the analytics dashboards front-end work. Companion to frontend_session_context.json (the prior backend/architecture handoff).
session_focus: Build the front-end + API layer (three dashboards) against a disposable reference backend, polish the Price Viewer hover UX, standardize date-range selection, architect Contribution for a future fact_contribution table, and define the static-export deployment workflow.
repo_state_at_start: Empty repo: only README.md, .gitignore, and frontend_session_context.json. The authoritative ETL backend (PostgreSQL + psycopg v3, fact_prices/fact_positions, etc.) lives on a DIFFERENT machine and is NOT in this repo.

key_decisions.reference_backend: Built a throwaway SQLite reference DB in THIS repo (data/reference.db) following the documented schema, purely to drive front-end dev. src/db/connection.py mirrors the real psycopg get_connection() contract so porting is mechanical (? -> %s, swap internals).
key_decisions.repo_root_as_etl_folder: Repo root is treated as the `etl/` folder so imports resolve as `from src.db.connection import ...`. Top-level src/ and web/.
key_decisions.frontend_stack: Next.js 14 static export (output:'export'). Confirmed working end-to-end; NO fallback to vanilla needed.
key_decisions.api_contract: Endpoints model business concepts (holdings, contribution), not raw tables. Single-origin: FastAPI serves the built bundle at / and the API at /api -> relative URLs, no CORS.
key_decisions.contribution_calc: Single-period buy-and-hold approximation (no fact_returns table): contribution_i = weight_i(d0) * return_i(d0->d1).
key_decisions.hosting: IP + port on the shared same-floor subnet. No vanity domain for now (would need an IT DNS record). Must run uvicorn with --host 0.0.0.0 for floor access.

reference_backend.seed_data: 24 securities, 4 portfolios, ~4,140 prices (multi-source), 200 position snapshots. fact_contribution created EMPTY (forward-looking).

dashboards.price_viewer: Prices by source line chart. Institutional/Bloomberg-style hover: dark multi-line tooltip (Source/Date/Return/Price) via Plotly hovertemplate+customdata, dotted crosshair (showspikes + spikesnap:'hovered data'), and a cursor-following x-axis date tag (paper-anchored annotation repositioned on onHover).
dashboards.positioning: Holdings table (sortable) + weight breakdown donut (asset class / currency). Point-in-time: driven by the date-range END (as-of date).
dashboards.contribution: Contribution bar chart + sortable table; portfolio return header. Single-period approximation, noted in UI.
dashboards.shared_components: components/DateRangePicker.js (the common From/To selector used by all three pages), PlotlyChart.js (client-only Plotly wrapper + dark hover defaults), SortableTable.js, Nav.js

contribution_future_proofing.selection: get_contribution_provider() auto-picks the fact table once it has rows; env override CONTRIBUTION_PROVIDER=derived|fact. Verified: empty->derived, populated->fact, cleanup->derived.
contribution_future_proofing.impact: Migrating to fact_contribution is a DATA event: no route change, no front-end change. Schema: src/db/schema/24_fact_contribution.sql (grain portfolio_id, entity_id, period_start, period_end, source).

deployment_workflow.model: Build on a dev machine (has Node/npm); i7 server has NO Node. Move SOURCE via git, move the built bundle via a GitHub Release zip (out/ is gitignored).
deployment_workflow.build_on_dev: cd web/apps/dashboards && npm ci && (NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE unset) npm run build  -> out/   then zip out/ -> dashboards-<version>.zip
deployment_workflow.artifact_produced_this_session: web/apps/dashboards/dashboards-0.1.0.zip (1.5 MB); verified NO absolute API base baked in (relative /api confirmed).

download_github_to_i7.frontend_only_change: Download the Release zip -> unzip into web/apps/dashboards/out/ (atomic swap: mv out_new out).
download_github_to_i7.backend_change: git pull (or download repo zip) for web/api/ + src/, plus the zip if UI also changed; restart uvicorn.
download_github_to_i7.first_time: Both source and the Release zip; pip install fastapi uvicorn (+ psycopg on the real backend).

deployment_workflow.serving: FastAPI main.py mounts out/ at / (after /api routers) via StaticFiles(html=True). Single origin, no CORS.

how_to_run_locally: open http://<ip>:8000/  (dashboards at /prices/, /positioning/, /contribution/ -- trailing slash required)
dev hot-reload: cd web/apps/dashboards && npm run dev  (port 3000, NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE from .env.development)

environment_constraints.corporate_ssl_interception: pip and npm fail cert verification. Workarounds used: pip --trusted-host pypi.org --trusted-host files.pythonhosted.org ; npm config set strict-ssl false. Proper fix = point at the corporate root CA.
environment_constraints.i7_server: No admin, no Node, no npm; FastAPI + PostgreSQL run here; process management via Task Scheduler (no systemd/nssm/Docker).
environment_constraints.network: Shared same-floor subnet, internal-only, no endpoint auth (trust-the-network).

gotchas: .gitignore ignores web/apps/*/out/ and *.zip -> correct for the Release approach; if ever committing the build, remove those lines first.
NEXT_PUBLIC_* is baked at BUILD time -> build with NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE unset or an absolute API URL gets compiled in (breaks same-origin/no-CORS).
trailingSlash:true -> files are prices/index.html; static serving won't redirect /prices -> /prices/. Always use the slash form.
StaticFiles mounts at startup: if uvicorn boots without out/ present, restart after deploying the bundle.
Replace out/ atomically (temp dir + mv); a partial copy leaves index.html referencing missing hashed chunks.
Floor access requires uvicorn --host 0.0.0.0 AND a Windows Firewall inbound rule for the port (rule likely needs admin).
Serving under a subpath later requires basePath/assetPrefix in next.config.js + rebuild.
open_items_next_steps: Register uvicorn under Task Scheduler on the i7 (always-on, auto-restart) with --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000.
Optional: add DASHBOARDS_BUNDLE_DIR env override in main.py, .nvmrc, and scripts/package_dashboards.sh (build+zip) for repeatability.
Port the reference backend to the real PostgreSQL + psycopg v3 (swap src/db/connection.py internals, ? -> %s).
Build the real ETL that populates fact_contribution -> dashboard switches to FactContributionProvider automatically.
Optional vanity URL: request an internal DNS A record (analytics.profuturo.pe -> i7 IP) from IT; app needs no rebuild (relative URLs).
Decide whether Positioning should stay as-of (range end) or become a two-date holdings delta.
memory_written: analytics-dashboards-build.md (repo layout, shared DateRangePicker, hover UX, contribution provider seam)
dashboards-deployment-workflow.md (build -> Release zip -> i7 swap; gotchas)
